themes.title: National priority policies spark constitutional debates
themes.blurb: Right-wing parties across Spain and Italy are pushing 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to public services. This theme has sparked intense debates over constitutionality and regional autonomy, with cross-national convergence in framing these policies as essential for national sovereignty and resource allocation.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Forces PP to declare on Senate motion to ban Bildu, pushes 'national priority' in healthcare and social services, sparking clashes with PP in Congress.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Partido Popular
countries.note: Clashes with Vox over 'national priority' despite regional alliances, amends Vox proposals to soften language.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Supports regional implementations of 'national priority' in social policies, aligns with Vox's rhetoric on immigration control.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Advocates for 'national preference' in economic and social policies, echoes Vox's stance on prioritizing citizens in public aid.

themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Far-right parties in Germany, France, Italy, and Sweden are experiencing unprecedented electoral gains, reshaping the political landscape. This surge is driven by shared concerns over immigration, national sovereignty, and economic instability, with parties adopting similar campaign strategies and messaging.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Leads polls at 27-28%, surpassing Union, with growing influence in local governments and debates over constitutional loyalty.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Marine Le Pen aims for 2027 runoff against centrists, gains traction with economic nationalism and anti-immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government faces internal rifts but maintains strong polling, with Lega pushing for EU fiscal flexibility.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Gains influence in Swedish politics, pushing for stricter immigration controls and collaboration with center-right parties.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Trump's administration policies, including immigration crackdowns, judicial appointments, and economic nationalism, are a focal point for right-wing media across the US, UK, Spain, and France. These policies are framed as models for national sovereignty and are frequently cited in debates over similar measures in other countries.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies on immigration, voter data access, and judicial appointments are central to right-wing discourse, with global media coverage.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Adopts Trump-style rhetoric on immigration and national sovereignty, gains traction in local elections.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Mirrors Trump's immigration policies, pushes for stricter border controls and national priority in social services.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Aligns with Trump's economic nationalism, advocates for protectionist policies and stricter immigration controls.

themes.title: Orbán’s resignation reshapes Hungarian politics
themes.blurb: Viktor Orbán's resignation as Hungarian PM and his offer to step down as Fidesz leader have sent shockwaves through Central Europe. This development is influencing right-wing parties in Poland and Germany, which are reassessing their strategies in response to Orbán's political decline and the rise of opposition leader Péter Magyar.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Orbán resigns as PM, offers to step down as Fidesz leader, sparking internal party reorganization and debates over future direction.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Monitors Orbán's resignation closely, reassesses strategies for maintaining influence in Central Europe.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Views Orbán's decline as a cautionary tale, debates implications for far-right movements in Europe.

countries.name: 🇪🇺 EU Relations
countries.note: EU officials react to Orbán's resignation, assess impact on Hungary's EU funding and policy alignment.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric in Italy, Spain, the UK, and the US is increasingly linked to incidents of political violence. This theme explores how inflammatory language and conspiracy theories from far-right leaders are contributing to a rise in threats and attacks against political opponents, journalists, and marginalized groups.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government faces criticism for inflammatory rhetoric, linked to rising political tensions and attacks on opponents.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Abascal's rhetoric fuels political violence, with incidents at rallies and threats against opponents.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage's rhetoric linked to rising threats against political opponents and marginalized communities.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rhetoric fuels political violence, with multiple assassination attempts and threats against opponents.
